title: quercus ciliaris
intro: Quercus ciliaris, also known as the 'Sichuan oak' or 'Chinese evergreen oak', is a species of deciduous tree in the family Fagaceae. The bark and leaves of Quercus ciliaris have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus ciliaris include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Quercus ciliaris can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
